evidence: "I like me some DREDD! Great movie, not what I expected. Very harsh, and violent...but some great sci-fi action."
"A fantastic, fun movie full of out-of-this-world creatures and battles that are beyond belief...OF COURSE!"
"It's good for most of the reasons given. It's also bad for the bad reasons given."
"Just watch it, it's fun, fast-paced, and has all the cursing & skinny dipping one needs."
"Just watch it, it's fun, fast-paced, and has all the cursing & skinny dipping one needs."
"I liked it. Nothing grand, but good story."
"Watch the trailer, and you've seen enough. This movie has no redeeming value."
"Forget the nay sayers and just have a good time watching it"
"A fantastic, fun movie full of out-of-this-world creatures and battles that are beyond belief..."
"Great movie! No better way to spend your lunch hour than HIMYM."
"This movie is GREAT, possibly better than the 1st. All 3 of my kids loved it as much as me."
"So YES, this Star Wars movie is different. O M G, the world may come to an end."

summary: The user enjoys fast-paced, entertaining movies, particularly in the sci-fi and comedy genres. They have a low sensitivity to production quality and show a strong emotional connection to films that resonate with them and their family.
